## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Rapyd and fwd.digital for advanced AI-driven content marketing and SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers sophisticated AI-powered content creation and SEO tools, aligning with Rapyd's needs](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Proposed engagement: $9k/month for 90-day pilot, including dedicated team and proprietary AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Focus areas: SEO automation, content marketing, and exploring innovative AI applications (e.g., podcast repurposing)](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Next steps: fwd.digital to send SOW and additional materials for internal Rapyd review](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

## Topics

### Current Rapyd SEO and Content Objectives

  - [Exploring automation for blogs and web pages (100 blogs/month commitment)](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Focus areas: iGaming, Hong Kong expansion, point of sale card terminals](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Automated outreach for backlinking (moving away from traditional backlink networks)](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Optimizing existing high-performing web pages and blogs](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Content gap analysis on competitors' articles and resource sections](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Experimenting with image and webpage automation using AI](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

### fwd.digital's AI-Powered Capabilities

  - [Advanced AI research and content generation system](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Customizable workflows with granular control and monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Automated fact-checking and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Sophisticated image generation and manipulation](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Ability to create AI-generated product screenshots contextually relevant to content](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)

### Content Marketing Innovations

  - [AI-driven newsletter creation and syndication](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Podcast repurposing and automation](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Programmatic PDF and webpage generation](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Data-driven content strategy using tools like Data Grid for leveraging internal data](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)

### Engagement Details

  - [Starting package: $9k/month (minimum engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2477.0)
  - [90-day pilot period with option to cancel](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2618.0)
  - [Dedicated team including managing editor, SEO specialist, writers, and strategist](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2574.0)
  - [Access to proprietary AI tools and infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2558.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [SEO automation and content creation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Exploring innovative AI applications for marketing](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Leveraging Rapyd's expertise to enhance fwd.digital's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2448.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to send Scope of Work (SOW) proposal for February 10th start date](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)
  - [fwd.digital to provide additional background materials and presentations](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2862.0)
  - [Mark to review proposal and secure internal approval for budget](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to discuss specifics and finalize engagement](https://fathom.video/share/tyDoYXnXhSfAW1XzAkp6JauW7hySx4Zs?tab=summary&timestamp=2859.0)
